creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,
I know this is from 2008 but I'm going through old PRs and I would like to
know if you are still having this issue.
Keep in mind that you either need to run xset fp+ /path/to/font && xset fp
rehash or add     FontPath        "/path/to/font" to your xorg.conf file.
